conventions.name: workspace-packages-have-manifest
conventions.description: Every direct packages/* directory should be an actual workspace package.

conventions.name: typescript-packages-have-tsconfig
conventions.description: TypeScript workspace packages should keep a local tsconfig.json.

conventions.name: source-packages-have-src-entrypoint
conventions.description: Regular source packages should expose a src/index.ts entrypoint.

conventions.name: kiota-sdk-package-shape
conventions.description: Generated Kiota SDK packages should keep their root barrel, generated client, models barrel, and README.

conventions.name: kiota-sdk-barrels-export-client
conventions.description: Generated Kiota SDK root barrels should export the generated client factory and type.

conventions.name: shared-component-areas-have-barrels
conventions.description: Shared component area directories should expose an index.ts barrel.

conventions.name: shared-component-area-barrels-are-pure
conventions.description: Shared component area index files should stay as pure re-export barrels.

conventions.name: admin-supported-locale-directories
conventions.description: Admin i18n should keep the full supported locale set.

conventions.name: admin-locale-namespaces
conventions.description: Every admin locale should include the same namespace files.

conventions.name: store-supported-locale-directories
conventions.description: Store i18n should keep the full supported locale set.

conventions.name: store-locale-namespaces
conventions.description: Every store locale should include the default translation namespace.

conventions.name: storybook-stories-have-meta
conventions.description: Storybook stories should use the standard typed Storybook imports.
